$comment: Versioned, immutable release URL (git tag v2.9.0); 'main' carries the latest. See GOVERNANCE.md.
title: Genlock Video Map
description: Per-project mapping of shot IDs to video takes. Stored at projects/{slug}/video-map.json. Both AI-rendered takes (renders/video/) and user-imported takes (assets/video/) are valid entries; the path prefix distinguishes their origin.

ShotVideoEntry.description: All video takes associated with a single shot.

takes.description: Ordered list of video takes for this shot. At most one take may have isActive: true at any time. The active take is the primary take shown in the Timeline and Production Player.

id.description: Take identifier. Convention: V1, V2, V3, V4 (uppercase V followed by a positive integer).

file.description: Path to the video file, relative to the workspace root. AI pipeline renders use renders/video/{shot_id}.v{n}.{ext}. User-imported files use assets/video/{filename}.

isActive.description: Whether this is the active (primary) take for the shot. Exactly one take per shot should have isActive: true. When appending a new AI-generated take, set isActive: true on the new take and isActive: false on all prior takes for this shot.

label.description: Optional human-readable label for the take (e.g. 'Alt angle', 'Higgsfield v2').

bone_id.description: The bone_id of the BONE definition that generated this take, if it was produced by the AI pipeline. Duplicated inside provenance.bone_id when a full provenance block is present.

duration.description: Duration of the take in seconds, if known.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this take was created or imported.

prompt.description: The assembled prompt text that produced this take (legacy provenance field, kept for pre-2.9 writers). New writers SHOULD also populate provenance.prompt.

promptJson.description: The structured prompt object that produced this take (legacy provenance field, kept for pre-2.9 writers). New writers SHOULD also populate provenance.params.

extensions.description: Vendor-namespaced extension data. Keys MUST start with 'x-'.

Provenance.description: How this render was made: enough to reproduce it, audit it, and disclose it. Hosts SHOULD write this block for every AI-generated take.

provider.description: Provider namespace, e.g. bytedance, runway, higgsfield.

prompt.description: The final assembled prompt sent to the generator.

params.description: Generation parameters: seed, duration, guidance, resolution, ...

job_id.description: Provider job/request ID for audit trails.
